claim: reposix init sim::demo creates working tree with extensions.partialClone=origin, remote.origin.promisor=true, remote.origin.partialclonefilter=blob:none
rationale: Test spawns sim, runs reposix init, validates all four git config keys match expected values (lines 148-162)

claim: git checkout -B main refs/reposix/origin/main succeeds after reposix init
rationale: Test does init but does not verify checkout command succeeds; partial-clone fetch may not have completed refs

claim: ls issues/ in initialized working tree lists exactly [0001.md 0002.md 0003.md 0004.md 0005.md]
rationale: Test does not verify directory contents; would require full blob materialization or tree walk after fetch

claim: cat issues/0001.md returns frontmatter (id, title, status, assignee, labels, version) + body markdown
rationale: Test does not read or parse issue file; would require blob materialization and roundtrip validation against seed.json fixture

claim: After editing (append comment + sed status change), git diff shows both hunks
rationale: Test does not exercise the edit path; would require symlink resolution in partial-clone working tree

claim: git push succeeds with output To reposix::..., [new branch] main -> main
rationale: Test does not run git push; would require conflict-detection logic in export helper + REST backend write

claim: sqlite3 ~/.cache/reposix/sim-demo.git/cache.db SELECT ts, op, decision FROM audit_events_cache WHERE op LIKE 'helper_push_%' returns rows
rationale: Test does not push or query audit table; would require cross-component integration (helper + cache DB)
